name: Forward Kinematics
description: Compute the forward kinematics frame for a RobotCellState. The returned frame depends on target_mode (ROBOT/TOOL/WORKPIECE).

inputParameters.name: planner
inputParameters.description: A planner instance (AnalyticalKinematicsPlanner, MoveItPlanner, PyBulletPlanner, AnalyticalPyBulletPlanner).

inputParameters.name: cell_state
inputParameters.description: RobotCellState containing the configuration to evaluate.

inputParameters.name: target_mode
inputParameters.description: Which frame to return: 'ROBOT' (PCF, default), 'TOOL' (TCF of attached tool), or 'WORKPIECE' (OCF of attached workpiece).

inputParameters.name: group
inputParameters.description: Optional planning group name. Defaults to the cell's main planning group.

outputParameters.name: plane
outputParameters.description: Same result as a Rhino Plane for downstream Grasshopper components.
